name: FIRST_PUBLICATION_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Given a TargetPair, return the earliest publication year and example publication numbers in that year.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN y.year AS year, collect(p.pub_no) AS patents
ORDER BY year ASC
LIMIT 1;

examples: When was the first patent published for PD-1×VEGFA?
